postings: Google DeepMind is actively hiring for a range of advanced machine‑learning roles, including Research Scientist positions focused on Reinforcement Learning, Multimodal Generative AI, and Robotics, with offices in London and Singapore, as well as related product and program management jobs such as Product Manager for the Gemini App and Senior Technical Program Manager; candidates are expected to have strong expertise in machine learning, large language models, and AI engineering, and the company’s hiring cycle typically posts new openings each year, so similar positions are likely to be available throughout 2025.
velocity: DeepMind, Google’s AI research arm, is actively posting a variety of AI and machine‑learning positions within the past month, including a Research Scientist role focused on multimodal generative AI, a senior “AI Economist” position exploring the economic impacts of AGI, a Software Engineer for AI Products in Mountain View, California, and a Research Engineer specializing in chip design, with openings listed on major job boards such as Greenhouse, ZipRecruiter, WorkWay and Built In and targeting full‑time, mid‑to‑senior level candidates across locations like California and Singapore.
